UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARCHESE, TONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDFARB, SCOTT DRESKIN, ANDREW THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 26 MUSEUM WAY, S.F. CA, LEASE FORFEITED

STIPULATION AND ORDER FOR EVICTION SHALL BE STAYED TO MAY 8, 1994 - GRANTED - 6- JUDGE DESMOND.
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF MAY-16-1994, OFF CALENDAR STIPULATION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AFTER MOTION WAS FILED.
